creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
martymac@

Can you have a look at pcsxr? Perhaps worth considering removing it as upstream is dead and we have retroarch (libretro) in ports?

https://www.freshports.org/games/libretro-beetle_psx/
https://www.freshports.org/games/libretro-pcsx_rearmed/

Best regards,
Daniel
